name: Colbor W100R Portable RGB LED Monolight
description: Highly versatile in its portability, control, color output, and power options, the W100R Portable RGB LED Monolight from COLBOR has a camera-like, palm-sized design ideal for on-the-go creators.

features.Key Features:: For Content Creators & Vloggers | Output: 6500 Lux at 3.3' w/ Reflector | 360 RGB Color, 2700-6500K CCT | AC Power; Accepts Optional Battery Grips | Supports PD USB-C Fast Charging | Onboard & App Controll; NFC Connection | Quiet Fan Cooling, TLCI/CRI 97 | Portable Pocket-Size Design | Includes Power Adapter, Dome, Reflector
